Name: Garlic Note
Odor Description:
A powerful, pungent aroma dominated by garlic and skunk tones, with a gassy, slightly fermented character.
fermented cloves sealed in a jar, cracked open after months in the dark. The opening is pungent and overwhelming, a blast of skunky sulfur, wet soil, and mothballs (naphthalene), with a raw, organic edge that feels almost human: sweaty, feral, alive. The body settles into a deep GMO groove,  heavy and dense, with dank cellar humidity, rotting greens, and a sharp, chemical note like overcooked cabbage meets burnt hair. ThereŐs a slight gasoline vapor trail that hangs in the background, giving the profile altitude and danger. It doesnŐt fade, it expands. Thick, earthy, animalic. A full-spectrum cannabis funk designed for those who chase the heavy.
This is not clean Kush This is garlic-fueled GMO rot, compressed into gassy power.

Name: Guava Lava
Odor Description:
Tropical fruit nectar body with strong Guava and Apricot top notes. Sweet peach back note.

A molten wave of tropical fruit built around a bold, unfiltered guava core. The first hit is unmistakable  ripe pink guava, warm and sticky, with that wild, slightly fermented edge that defines true guava intensity. ItŐs juicy and loud, with a fleshy sweetness that borders on creamy, almost nectar-like. Underneath, soft layers of apricot and peach build a smooth, sunlit foundation. The apricot adds golden tang and pulpy depth; the peach brings fuzzy roundness and sweetness that melts into the guava seamlessly. ThereŐs a subtle fun, not dirty, but alive, giving the profile a tropical push that feels both juicy and warm, like fruit ripened past its peak, almost starting to caramelize in the sun. This isnŐt a blended fruit profile. This is guava in full expression, surrounded by supporting notes that lift it without dulling its edge.

Name: Juicy Blueberry
Odor Description:
Strong fruity Blueberry body with purple and blue notes,
The aroma bursts with ripe blueberry candy, syrupy and bright, but quickly opens into juice-like freshness: think wild blueberry nectar, cold-pressed and dripping.
At the heart, there's a clear fruit core not artificial, but full-spectrum. You can feel the peel, the pulp, the tannins, the skin. ItŐs sweet but it's also textured, with soft purple floral edges and a hint of tart berry acidity that keeps it alive. The sweetness is explosive, juicy in a way that coats the palate, but not flat. Every inhale reveals a new layer: first pop, then jammy depth, then a soft, musky finish like crushed blueberry skin.

Name: Kush Note
Odor Description:
Powerful and deep Kush with earthy tones.
A unique and powerful Kush expression  piercing yet enveloping, built around a deep gaseous core that unfolds into rich sulfuric layers.
It delivers the unmistakable sensation of cracking open a bag of rare, high-grade flower. The aroma is intensely characteristic  a pure distillation of loud, pungent cannabis.

The profile balances sharp, sulfury Kush funk with a stable terpene base: earthy, slightly peppery, and tightly constructed. The gas doesnŐt scream it resonates, filling the air and the nose with a thick, sticky weight that holds.

This is not just Kush, itŐs gas-forward Kush with presence.
Undeniable. Unmistakable. Unforgettable.

Name: Manali Hash
Odor Description: strong sukforic and thiolic with earthy base, moth balls, poop,  strong burned tar and gas notes. terpntine and hot resines top notes with highe volume of chloride' minty chemical layer formulation inspired by Himalayan hash traditions. Manali Hash pays homage to the legendary hash culture of Northern India, not by replicating a single product, but by channeling the aromatic spirit of Charas. This formulation blends multiple aroma dimensions to evoke a richly layered sensory experience: earthy musk, warm floral spice, hints of forest resin, and sacred smoke. But beneath the traditional warmth, a more modern edge emerges, sharp green volatility, almost chemical, with flashes of diesel-kush gas that cut through the softness with bright, assertive intensity. A quiet tension holds it all together: ancient resin soulfulness meets high-voltage terpene electricity. ThereŐs a slight bitterness Ń crushed leaf, wild mint, and oxidized pine, riding under the surface, adding lift and structure.

Name: Tricks Milk - Enhancer
Odor Description:
Taste like Trix ceral Milk, creamy, soft and fruity.
Sweet, fruity, and unapologetically nostalgic. This flavor captures the exact sensation of finishing a bowl of fruity cereal, that leftover milk, now thick with color, sugar, and playful artificial fruit notes. The opening is bright and punchy: berry-citrus candy, powdery fruit loops, and a soft vanilla-milk haze that rounds it out. ThereŐs a creamy body underneath  cereal-soaked milk, lightly buttery, with hints of malted grain and melted sugar dust. ItŐs warm, sweet, and familiar, with a long-lasting finish that feels like the last sip from the bowl - milky, fruity, and perfectly synthetic.

Name: Tripy Tropy
Odor Description:
A juicy burst of ripe mango, kiwi, apricot and pineapple wrapped in sweet grape and a hint of warm cinnamon, with some fresh laundry and rosmary undertones, evoking playful tropical fruit gum vibes

and syrupy, but never flat, bursting with that unmistakable tropical brightness only mango can bring. Wrapped around the mango is a swirl of ripe banana candy, soft, sweet, and slightly artificial, blended with playful watermelon bubblegum and a splash of cool watermelon water, giving the blend a lifted, fruity shine.
A base of sweet coconut cream holds it all together, milky, smooth, and just tropical enough, while a gentle minty breeze cuts through the richness, cooling the palate and crystallizing the sweetness into something clean and craveable. Mango leads. The rest follows. A trippy, creamy, candy-fruit explosion with tropical heat and icy clarity.

Name: Truffle Kush
Odor Description:
A deep, grounded profile with a dark, intoxicating pull. It opens with rich, earthy kush, moist soil, forest floor, and dry wood, and a soft gassy sulfuric aftersmell. Almost immediately, the black truffle kicks in: funky, musky, and unmistakably gourmet. ThereŐs a sharp, fermented edge to it, like aged umami, that pulls the nose in deeper.
On the palate, it lands thick and savory. The gas hits low and slow, dense, resinous, and mouth-coating - while the truffle brings a wild, animalic roundness, full of warmth and depth. As it opens up, you get herbal creaminess: soft, buttery, slightly spiced, almost like a white truffle bŽchamel or Alfredo. The finish is long and layered: earthy, creamy, and slightly peppery, with a subtle dry lift that keeps it from going flat. This isnŐt your usual flavor profile, itŐs a culinary terp trip. Complex, heavy, and elegant in its own dirty way.
Tags: creamy, Kush, Gas, savory, Truffle, Umami

Name: Lemonhead +
Odor Description:
Dry, zesty lemon dominates, sharp and citrusy without being juicy or sweet.
A layer of pine and fresh herbs sits just beneath, adding brightness and dimension to the core citrus.
Altogether, the nose is focused, clean, and energetic Ń with a linear freshness that cuts through.
A burst of citrus freshness - tangy, zesty, with an intense explosion of sourness followed by a cool mint
Tags: Lemonade, citrus, Lemon, Herbal, Bright, sharp

Name: Melonade +
Odor Description:
A high-toned citrus bouquet with fresh lemon peel and lime zest dominates the top layer.
Beneath that, there's juicy cantaloupe and honeydew - softening the sharp citrus with round, tropical warmth.
Finishes with a clean herbal whisper, adding lift and a refreshing aftertone that lingers.
Tropical smells like the clean air of the ocean, combined with citrus and fruity smells like lemon and melon

Name: Peach Crescendo +
Odor Description:
Ripe peach and white grape give this a lush, sweet open ,soft and floral, like fresh fruit skin. Just beneath that softness is a volatile edge: diesel bite, rawness, and a whisper of funk. It finishes with a waxy, almost resinous tone that gives it longevity and keeps it from feeling too light.

Pleasant notes of lemon and peach with a slight gassy aroma
Tags: Diesel, Floral, Peach, Lemon, Gas, Fruity, Fresh

Name: Sour Apple Gelato +
Odor Description:
Bright green apple jumps out immediately, crisp, tart, and slightly acidic on the nose.
Underneath, a creamy citrusĐvanilla quality unfolds, evoking sour candy blended into soft dessert. The contrast is well-defined, giving the aroma both sharpness and silky depth without one overpowering the other.
A perfect blend of sweet and sour notes with strong tones of oven-baked apple gelato
Tags: citrus, creamy, Vanilla, Apple, Sour, Candy, TartApple, Dessert

Name: Glitter Bomb +
Odor Description:
Opens with loud, juicy grape and dark berries, thick, sweet, and slightly overripe in character.
Quickly develops into something funkier: a dense herbal base with diesel hints and GMO spice.
The aromatic experience is layered and expressive, walking the line between playful and grounded.
Tags: BerryNotes, Diesel, raspberry, Gas, Herbal, Garlic, Blueberry, Grape, Grapes, GMO

Name: Glurilla +
Odor Description:
A thick, dominant diesel aroma hits first - sharp and almost metallic, with gritty fuel undertones.
As it settles, earthy pine and damp soil notes come through, giving it a natural, forest-floor weight.
There's a subtle trace of bitter cocoa in the background, which adds depth and complexity to the finish.
Tags: Diesel, pine, Glue, Mud, Cocoa, Metallic, ForestFloor

Name: Sherblato +
Odor Description:
Sweet sherbet and lemon icing notes open the nose, light, creamy, and confectionary in character.
Then comes the base: kushy earth, warm herbs, and a faint floral spice that grounds the sweetness.
The full aroma is dynamic and full-bodied - moving from bright and sugary to soft and weighty.
Tags: Dough, creamy, Vanilla, Kush, Lemon, Gas, Earthy, IceCream, Sherbert

Name: Permanent RNTZ +
Odor Description: Sweet and fruity at first sniff  reminiscent of tropical candy or sour Skittles. Just beneath the sweetness is a dry, solvent-like gas note that sharpens the edges and adds structure. The two layers coexist in tension, creating a bright-yet-punchy aromatic identity that evolves with time.
Tags: Sour, Gas, sweet, Fruity, Bright, sharp, Chem

Name: Static +
Odor Description: Bright and herbaceous, with sharp top-notes of lemon rind and crushed pine needles. Hints of green tea and wild mint add freshness and a cooling lift. The overall scent is light yet vibrant- clean, green, and quietly energizing.
Tags: Lime, eucalyptus, pine, Floral, Lemon, Herbal, Grass, Fresh, tea

Name: Ketama +
Odor Description: Deep and earthy, opening with warm black pepper, bitter cocoa, and aged wood. Subtle notes of leather, resin, and incense smoke evolve as it warms. The aroma is dark, oxidized, and grounding, evoking old-world pressed hashish.
Tags: Gas, Earthy, Mud, Cocoa, peppery, Chem, GMO, Coffee

Name: La Musse +
Odor Description: Soft and dry floral, with hay, almond skin, and chamomile at the surface. Deeper tones of cherrywood and saffron emerge on the exhale. The profile is powdery, warm, and refined, elegant without being sweet.

Name: Apples and Bananas +

Name: STV

Name: NDC

Name: Apple Jax
Odor Description: Sweet, fruity aroma reminiscent of fresh apples, complemented by earthy and skunky undertones

Name: Garlic Cookies
Odor Description: Opens dark and grounded heavy earth, dry wood, and that unmistakable funk riding just underneath. ItŐs not loud at first, but it expands fast: deep soil, roasted garlic, and that raw GMO edge that feels almost dirty in a good way. There's a dryness to the woodiness like cracked bark or dead leaves that wraps around the funk and holds it down. The whole thing stays low, musky, and warm, with barely any sweetness. ItŐs deep forest floor with gas leaking in from below.

Name: Lava candy
Odor Description: Opens loud and juicy guava right up front, tropical and sweet with that creamy, pulpy edge. The candy tone kicks in fast  bright, slightly sour, almost fizzy  like guava turned into hard candy without losing its funk. Sticky, sharp, and playful.

Name: Cranberry Frost Cream
Odor Description: Opens with a sharp cranberry hit  tart, red, and cold like it sat under frost too long and snapped. The acidityŐs alive, almost electric, but doesnŐt stay harsh for long. A soft vanilla cream comes in quick, whipped and chilled, more texture than sweetness  like cold mousse that never tried to be dessert. The finish drifts into something cooler Ń clean camphor, minty and open, like cold air pulling through your teeth. It doesnŐt end on flavor, it ends on temperature, crisp, quiet, and still.

Name: Cherry Pine Nog
Odor Description: Starts off dense and creamy, like warm vanilla custard with a quiet layer of burnt sugar and soft spice,  cinnamon, nutmeg, nothing sharp. Then it shifts: a tart cherry note comes through, not candy-like, but slightly bitter-almond, almost marzipan, slicing gently through the warmth. As it settles, a quiet green lift rises from underneath. a piney freshness that doesnŐt rush in, just unfolds slowly, like cold air moving through wood. ItŐs layered but calm Ń dessert, resin, and winter silence wrapped together.
Main Terpenes: Beta Caryophyllene, Alpha Pinene, Alpha Bisabolol

Name: Kiwi Sorbet
Odor Description: Starts bright and chilled sharp kiwi acidity hits first, green and slightly tangy, with that pulpy texture that almost fizzes on the tongue. Right under it, thereŐs a soft sorbet creaminess cold, smooth, not milky, more like icy fruit flesh thatŐs just started to melt. There's a tropical twist in the background something between melon and lime but kiwi stays in front, fresh and sour-sweet. The whole thing feels like biting into frozen fruit with the sun on your face sharp, cold, and clean.

Name: Lychee
Odor Description: Opens sharp and floral  bright litchi flesh with that juicy, almost perfume-like sweetness. ThereŐs a slight sour edge, tropical but clean, like grape skin with rosewater. ItŐs slick, fragrant, and high-pitched  sweet without being sticky, and gone almost as fast as it hits.

Name: Strawberry Lemonade
Odor Description: Opens bright and zesty sharp lemon cuts first, fresh and citrusy, then blends into sweet strawberry body. The balance stays tight tart and sugary, like cold pink lemonade with extra pulp. Juicy, high-pitched, and clean on the finish.

Name: Sweet Chem
Odor Description: Bold, sweet aroma with spft strawberry notes, balanced by classic chemical, earthy, kush and garlic undertones.
Tags: strawberry, sweet, Garlic, Pungent, MAC, Chem, Nutty

Name: Hibiscus Cranberry
Odor Description: Tart, tangy cranberry notes with floral, slightly fruity hibiscus undertones, creating a refreshing balance of bold zest and subtle sweetness.
Tags: BerryNotes, Floral, Fruity, tea, Hibiscus, Cranberry

Name: Sour Space Candy
Odor Description: Opens tart and punchy  lemon rind and sour cherry up front, sharp and high-pitched. Quickly blends into a sweet strawberry note, juicy but bright, almost fizzy. Underneath it all sits that classic hempy funk earthy, a little woody  grounding the fruit. ItŐs electric, sweet-sour, and slightly twisted.

Name: French Vanilla
Odor Description: Indulge in the rich and creamy aroma of classic French vanilla, offering a smooth, luxurious taste that's both comforting and sophisticated.
Tags: creamy, caramel, milk, Vanilla, sweet, Dessert

Name: Cantaloupe
Odor Description: A cantaloupe-forward profile with soft honeydew hints at the core - juicy, round, and mellow. As it opens up, thereŐs an after-aroma and flavor reminiscent of watermelon, touched by floral nectar and honey-like notes that lend it a gentle sweetness. Light strawberry top notes lift and amplify the fruity tone without overpowering. Beneath it all lies a smooth, almost creamy base that echoes the texture and lingering mouthfeel of coconut cream - not overt, but present in the finish.

Name: Sweet Kiwi Sherbet
Odor Description: Opens bright and juicy  sweet kiwi up front with that tropical, candy-like pull. Quickly turns sour, sharp around the edges, almost fizzy. The sherbet vibe holds it together cold, tangy, and sweet-sour all at once. Fast, loud, and zesty.

Name: Tiger Blood
Odor Description: Opens sharp and juicy sour cherry and ripe strawberry hit first, bright and a little wild. A lemony edge cuts through quick, zesty and clean. Underneath, thereŐs a soft coconut note creamy, almost sunscreen-sweet wrapping the fruit in a warm, tropical layer. Bold, sweet-sour, and just left of familiar.

Name: Cherry Lemon Mint
Odor Description: Opens with a soft cherry note, ripe, slightly creamy, more like the flesh of the fruit than anything syrupy. Beneath that, a gentle almond tone creeps in, faintly bitter and tart, adding a sour twist that cuts through the roundness. Then comes the lift: a precise mint note, cool and restrained, that chills the edges and clears the palate without overpowering. ItŐs a balance of red, sour, and green  understated, but present.
Tags: Lime, creamy, Cherry, Vanilla, Lemon, Almonds

Name: Pink RNTZ
Odor Description: Opens with that classic Runtz hit  creamy, sweet, and tart all at once, like candy left out in the sun. Right behind it creeps a sulfuric funk garlicky GMO tones with a sharp, fermented edge. The gas builds from underneath, thick and loud, cutting through the sugar with weight. ItŐs glossy up top, dirty at the base candy over fuel.

Name: Cotton Candy Lemonade
Odor Description: An extra-sweet profile that hits fast with bright strawberry and a sharp lemony tang , instantly reminiscent of a red hard candy from somewhere in the past. ItŐs playful but pointed, with that nostalgic high-note sweetness that almost sparkles. As it fades, a soft caramelized sugar finish lingers , not heavy, just a slight burnt edge that gives the whole thing a toasted warmth beneath the brightness.
Tags: Lemonade, caramel, sugar, strawberry, Sour, Lemon, sweet, Candy

Name: Peach Mango
Odor Description: Opens lush and ripe  thick mango nectar with that deep tropical pull, almost creamy. Peach follows right behind, softer, more floral, leaning into perfumed rather than juicy. The sweetness has a slight candy edge, but stays smooth. ItŐs golden, round, and slow-melting  like fruit syrup left in the sun.

Name: Frosted Fruit Cake
Odor Description: Opens thick and sugary< that frosted fruit sweetness hits first, like candied berries folded into dense cake batter. But it doesnŐt stay soft for long. Underneath, thereŐs a sharp funk rising , skunky, slightly fermented, almost chemical, like overripe fruit mashed into gas. The creaminess is there, but itŐs soaked in fuel, more like whipped frosting sitting on a warm engine. As it fades, the finish gets cooler, almost minty, but faint  a breath of clean after the weight. ItŐs sweet, loud, and just a little unstable in the best way.

Name: Banana OG
Odor Description: this one leans into that classic cannabis banana strains vibe, fresh banana up front, with a soft, almost creamy undertone at the base. Underneath, it carries deep, earthy-sulfuric notes reminiscent of kush and skunk, giving it a raw, grounded backbone. ThereŐs also a subtle tropical cannabis nuance threading through it Ń not obvious, but once you catch it, it sticks."

Name: Red Lady Papaya
Odor Description: Opens soft and tropical ripe papaya flesh with that creamy, musky sweetness that leans almost fermented. ThereŐs a red fruit glow behind it  something between guava and berry  giving it a rounder, juicier lift. The finish stays dense and tropical, with a faint funk that clings to the back of the tongue. Sweet, pulpy, and low-key wild.

Name: Gum Cake
Odor Description: Opens bright and chewy, loud bubblegum sweetness with a soft, cakey body underneath. The fruit comes in fast: banana candy right up front, followed by flashes of pineapple and strawberry, all wrapped in that sticky, round sugar tone that feels more like texture than flavor. The creaminess isnŐt heavy, more like frosting that melted into the dough, subtle but warm. As it fades, a faint minty coolness creeps in, clearing the top of the palate without washing anything out. ItŐs dense, playful, and weirdly smooth,  like frosting, fruit, and gum packed into one bite.
Tags: strawberry, Vanilla, Banana, Pineapple, Mint, Cake

Name: Passionfruit
Odor Description: Opens sharp and exotic  bright tropical acidity with that funky passion fruit bite. Sweetness comes through quick but stays wild, almost fermented. ThereŐs a slight floral edge and a pulpy tang that coats the mouth. Juicy, sour, and just a little off in the best way.

Name: Pina Colada
Odor Description: Opens smooth and tropical  sweet pineapple up front, juicy but soft, layered over a thick coconut cream that coats the tongue. ThereŐs a slight vanilla warmth underneath, almost rum-like. ItŐs sweet, lush, and chilled Ń like a frozen drink melting slow.

Name: Creamy Root Beer
Odor Description: Thick and creamy from the start Ń a deep root beer profile that leans more vanilla-float than spice-heavy. ThereŐs that classic wintergreen and anise backbone, but itŐs softened by a sweet, milky richness that coats the tongue like melted ice cream in soda. It doesnŐt bite Ń it lingers, smooth and almost dessert-like, with a low hum of barrel-aged wood and a whisper of cola syrup in the background.

Name: Menthol Frost
Odor Description: Hits cold and clean sharp menthol rush that opens the palate fast, almost numbing. There's no sweetness, just a crisp, sterile chill like breathing in freezer air. Underneath, a faint herbal note keeps it from going flat  dry, minty, and pure. Icy from start to finish.

Name: Vanilla Ice Cream_
Odor Description: A sweet, creamy profile with cakey vanilla notes, hints of chocolate-coffee liqueur, light spice accents.

Name: Sweet Cotton Candy
Odor Description: A full-spectrum sugar rush built to overload the senses. At the core: a loud, spun-sugar hit that nails the unmistakable cotton candy vibe - light, sweet, and sticky in all the right ways. But this isnŐt just carnival fluff. Artificial strawberry lays down a bold, candy-red backbone, bright and punchy like a syrup concentrate. As it opens, soft cake-like undertones start to come through  vanilla-doughy warmth that adds comfort and contrast to the top-layer sweetness. It gives the blend a slightly baked quality without ever feeling heavy. The result is a profile that hovers between candy and confection: airy, sweet-forward, and totally indulgent. On the nose, expect a sharp sugar sparkle with hints of fake strawberry gum, followed by that soft-baked finish that lands somewhere between cake batter and pink frosting. ItŐs loud, clean, and designed to light up sweet-leaning formats.
Tags: strawberry, Vanilla, sweet, Candy, Gummy, CottenCandy

Name: Candy Gas
Odor Description:
Strawberry candy goes head-to-head with raw kush gas in a high-voltage mash-up that pulls no punches.
 Up top: spun sugar, strawberry syrup, cotton candy, full-blown artificial nostalgia that smacks sweet and sticks around. Then comes the turn - a dry, Kushy-heavy gas note - A unique and powerful Kush expression  piercing yet enveloping, built around a deep gaseous core that unfolds into rich sulfuric layers, drops in and cuts the sweetness dead-on. The result is balanced chaos: Sweet, candy like and soft on the inhale, loud and dank on the exhale.
This oneŐs made for spotlight products - carts or pre-rolls that donŐt apologize for being loud, sweet, and aggressively gassy.

Name: Ultra Slushie
Odor Description:
Pineapple is the heart of this build - bright, juicy, and unapologetically tropical. It leads the mix with high-voltage tang and glowing acidity that hits right up front. The pineapple is followed by a sparkling grape soda base that adds nostalgic sweetness and body, like liquid candy fizzing in the background.
 Then come the supporting players: tart raspberry adds contrast, green apple keeps the edges sharp, and kiwi lands in the aftertaste with a mellow, slightly grassy smoothness. Wrapping it all together is a rich coconut creaminess, topped off with a spun sugar finish that leans into strawberry cotton candy.

Name: Berriez GlowPop
Odor Description:
A layered berry bomb with both power and finesse. The top opens with a trio of strawberries - ripe, wild, and syrupy, supported by juicy raspberries and deep blueberries. Then comes the kicker: cloudberry adds a high-end floral lift that subtly hints at lychee, creating a weightless, almost sparkling dimension.
 Underneath the fruit, thereŐs a thread of marzipan-like almond that softens into a gentle cherry roundness. This nutty warmth gives it body and depth, holding its own against the bright, jammy glaze that finishes the blend. That glaze, sweet, sticky, and cooked-fruit rich, gives this profile its candy-coated signature.
 Perfect for brands that want berries that hit hard but still move like an orchestra - sophisticated, in layers of harmony , and unforgettable.
Tags: BerryNotes, raspberry, Cherry, Blueberry, Almonds, blackberry

Name: Fruit Punch
Odor Description: Taste like fruity cerals mix, very sugary with a blend of citrus candy, candied watermelon and light notes of tangy-raspberry-grape smoothie.
Tags: Trix, FruityPebbles, SweetOrange, OrangeCandy, Fruitmix, Fruitloops

Name: Biscotti
Odor Description:
Biscotti
Rich, buttery, and decadent, Biscotti delivers a flavor profile that blends sweet vanilla, roasted almonds, and a creamy doughiness. The aroma carries a deep nutty warmth, layered with earthy kush and a faint diesel whisper.

Name: Iced Grapple
Odor Description: Sweet, fruity apple and grape notes with icy, refreshing undertones and a hint of earthy spice, delivering a balanced, uplifting, and calming experience.
